Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Eclipse is the Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — The Silent King Bow is feared by Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — The Silent King Bow is one of Lindon's weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Holding the Silent King Bow is an extra burden for Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — The Silent King Bow can copy arrows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — The Silent King Bow is Lindon's most powerful object that he can feasibly transfer as a prize.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — The oracle codex showed Northstrider tucking away the Silent King Bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon considers using the Silent King Bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — The Silent King Bow is a heavy metaphysical weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Silent King Bow is a weapon that snarls in dream aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon withdrew the Silent King Bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Silent King Bow is a Dreadgod weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Silent King Bow is a white-striped bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The Silent King Bow is a unique item made of irreplaceable components.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The cracks in Mercy's madra channels carried authority from the Silent King Bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Mercy had previously controlled the Silent King Bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon left the Silent King Bow with Mercy.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
